en: Do you know what? I'm a big lover of mac and cheese. Do you have any mac and cheese? Yes.
That'll be all. Brilliant. You got it. Thank you.
Thank you. Order. You want to throw in a macaroni and cheese?
Order up, Ash. That's my mac and cheese.
Thank you. That was very fast, the mac and cheese. My god.
It's a mouthful of goo. That's gross. Uh-oh.
That doesn't even taste like it's been cooked here. We don't make the mac and cheese here. No, it tastes like that.
ko: 여기서 조리한 맛이 전혀 안 나.

en: Is that a big hit? No. It's what the kids eat at. Oh, shit. Really?
Yeah, that's dreadful. Poor kids, damn. You think a menu with classic American,
you'd at least make your mac and cheese, right? Yeah. It's not good.
ko: 적어도 맥앤치즈는 직접 만들어야지, 맞지? 응. 별로야.

en: Like, I'm really sorry. I don't really know what to say, because I'm not the one making the food.
I'm just serving it. What did he say? He said it was gross.
